videos.headline: Hudson's one-handed grab sets up USC's go-ahead TD in final seconds
videos.description: After Kyron Hudson makes a sweet one-handed grab, Woody Marks scores from 13 yards out to give USC a 27-20 lead over LSU with just eight seconds remaining.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Hudson's one-handed grab sets up USC's go-ahead TD in final seconds) 2024/09/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: USC's defense makes a big stop on 4th-and-goal
videos.description: USC sends a blitz up the middle that makes Garrett Nussmeier throw the ball away on fourth down.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (USC’s defense makes a big stop on 4th-and-goal) 2024/09/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Harold Perkins Jr. blows up USC's opening drive
videos.description: LSU's Harold Perkins Jr. flies in to blow up USC's opening drive on offense.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Harold Perkins Jr. blows up USC’s opening drive) 2024/09/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Woody Marks barrels in for a Trojans TD
videos.description: Woody Marks rushes up the middle for a 2-yard touchdown to give USC a 7-0 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Woody Marks barrels in for a Trojans TD) 2024/09/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Brian Kelly irate at officials for calling a flag on LSU
videos.description: LSU head coach Brian Kelly is upset at the officials for calling a flag on the Tigers' defensive line.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Brian Kelly irate at officials for calling a flag on LSU) 2024/09/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Nussmeier and Lacy connect for a pretty LSU touchdown
videos.description: Garrett Nussmeier throws to the back of the end zone where Kyren Lacy comes down with a touchdown to tie the score 7-7.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Nussmeier and Lacy connect for a pretty LSU touchdown) 2024/09/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: LSU's kicker stops Zachariah Branch from scoring a TD
videos.description: LSU's Aeron Burrell makes a touchdown-saving tackle on explosive returner Zachariah Branch.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (LSU’s kicker stops Zachariah Branch from scoring a TD) 2024/09/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kirk Herbstreit's dog sprawls out in broadcast booth
videos.description: Kirk Herbstreit's dog, Ben, makes himself comfortable in the broadcast booth as LSU and USC face off.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kirk Herbstreit's dog sprawls out in broadcast booth) 2024/09/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Aaron Anderson walks into the end zone for an LSU TD
videos.description: Garrett Nussmeier rolls to his right and hits a wide-open Aaron Anderson to put LSU up 17-13.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Aaron Anderson walks into the end zone for an LSU TD) 2024/09/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: LSU's defense stops the Trojans on 4th-and-9
videos.description: LSU's Sai'vion Jones blocks Miller Moss' pass attempt to stop USC's drive.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (LSU’s defense stops the Trojans on 4th-and-9) 2024/09/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Miller Moss marches the Trojans down the field to regain the lead
videos.description: Miller Moss leads a three-play, 64-yard drive that ends with a 28-yard touchdown pass to Ja'Kobi Lane.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Miller Moss marches the Trojans down the field to regain the lead) 2024/09/01 ESHEET
